title: node:test, Original Feed Fixtures, Property Cases, and Compile-Negative Evidence · Type Forensics
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered TypeScript feed evidence suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Create small original RSS, Atom, namespace, encoding, entity, depth, date, identity, revision, malformed, and oversized fixtures with exact expectations.
Test URL, discovery, parser options, unknown validation, normalization, schedule, cursor, state, and policy with injected clocks and ports.
Control deferred settlement, abort order, time, lease expiry, pool error, listener cleanup, and unhandled rejection evidence deterministically.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Original Fixture Matrix
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 4372 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile original fixtures, deterministic async tests, compile-negative cases, and evidence non-claims; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then change one PostgreSQL constraint, transaction, migration, upsert, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Create small original RSS, Atom, namespace, encoding, entity, depth, date, identity, revision, malformed, and oversized fixtures with exact expectations.

Inspect the Feed Ts Original Fixture Matrix trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
